owner.name: CSNL Lab (Center for Computational Social Neuroscience, Korea University)

metadata.description: CSNL-internal Claude Code marketplace. Plugins here are research-tooling for the CSNL paper-recommendation harness and are intended for lab members only.

plugins.name: csnl-paper-archive-interview
plugins.description: CSNL paper-archive interview + downstream priming. Researcher-facing commands: paper-interview (MCQ walk over a per-researcher top-N queue), paper-weekly (auto-generated unread-paper batch), paper-blitz (Wednesday 5-min lab journal-club assignment), and paper-context (prime any Claude session with the researcher's persistent research context). Korean researcher-facing text; no send paths.
